hero.title: 墨稿 · Inkdraft
hero.intro: WYSIWYG Markdown editor with a built-in AI editing assistant. Edit in chat, confirm each change, auto-retry on mismatch—so every draft gets better.

wysiwyg.title: WYSIWYG
wysiwyg.description: Typora-style editing: write Markdown like a doc, with live headings, lists, and code blocks.

aiAssistant.title: AI editing assistant
aiAssistant.description: Side-panel chat for edits. Select text and refine. Multiple search/replace and insert in one go.

perEdit.title: Confirm per edit
perEdit.description: Apply or skip each AI suggestion. You decide what changes stay.

retry.title: Auto-retry
retry.description: On mismatch, the current doc and error are sent back to the AI until edits succeed or the retry limit is reached.

cta.title: Start your first draft
cta.desc: Sign in to create documents with cloud sync, multi-device editing, and auto-save.

footer.brand: 墨稿 · Inkdraft — Draft better with AI.
footer.author: Author

documents.welcomeDesc: Draft better with AI. WYSIWYG editing, cloud sync, and AI assistant.

auth.loginTitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.signUpTitle: Create an account to get started
auth.signUpSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox to complete sign up.
